base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of subweapon_pickup_stopwatch — a pickup_item from 1986 castlevania. Stopwatch subweapon pickup — freezes time briefly when used (5 hearts cost). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Stopwatch subweapon pickup — freezes time briefly when used (5 hearts cost)
